mapper.select:
SELECT
type, id, frame, supplier, time, number, total, actual, money as payment, nucleus, data, frame_name, supplier_name,
(actual - money) as balance, CASE WHEN nucleus = 0 THEN '0%' WHEN nucleus = 2 THEN '100%' ELSE CONCAT(ROUND((money / actual) * 100, 2), '%') END as rate FROM (
SELECT '采购单' as type, buy.id, buy.frame, buy.supplier, buy.time, buy.number, buy.total, buy.actual, buy.money, buy.nucleus, buy.data, frame.name as frame_name, supplier.name as supplier_name FROM buy LEFT JOIN frame ON buy.frame = frame.id LEFT JOIN supplier ON buy.supplier = supplier.id WHERE examine = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT '采购退货单' as type, bre.id, bre.frame, bre.supplier, bre.time, bre.number, -bre.total as total, -bre.actual as actual, -bre.money as money, bre.nucleus, bre.data, frame.name as frame_name, supplier.name as supplier_name FROM bre LEFT JOIN frame ON bre.frame = frame.id LEFT JOIN supplier ON bre.supplier = supplier.id WHERE examine = 1 ) as combined_data
ORDER BY time DESC
